title: Ghoti tool/repo intake static registry
description: Static, planning-only registry of external tool candidates Ghoti may evaluate. Listing a candidate here is NOT adoption: nothing in this file is installed, cloned, downloaded, executed, or wired into the runtime. Every candidate stays at status 'candidate_only' or 'blocked' until a separate, approved milestone wires it in after tests and a Codex audit. See docs/GHOTI_N6_7A_TOOL_INTAKE_STATIC_REGISTRY.md.

intake_pipeline.name: Sandbox only if needed
intake_pipeline.output: sandbox observation notes (no secrets, no network beyond test)

intake_pipeline.name: No runtime wiring until test + audit

stop_conditions_global: missing human approval at a [GATE] step

candidates.name: Understand-Anything
candidates.intended_value: Quickly explain an unfamiliar repo/codebase for triage.
candidates.safe_intake_method: Static README + license review; guidance-only.
candidates.first_safe_test: Read the project's README and license and summarize what it does; no clone, no run.
candidates.integration_target: Triage guidance for Hermes/Claude (future, after test + audit).
allowed_now: read the project's own README and docs
forbidden_now: wire it into the Ghoti runtime/dashboard/wrappers
make network calls on its behalf

candidates.name: MarkItDown
candidates.intended_value: Convert docs/PDF/office files to Markdown for compact memory.
candidates.safe_intake_method: Static review; sandboxed convert of one local fixture only.
candidates.first_safe_test: Statically review README + license; in a later approved sandbox, convert a single local fixture file with no network.
allowed_now: read the project's own README and docs
forbidden_now: wire it into the Ghoti runtime/dashboard/wrappers
make network calls on its behalf
